name: nginx-multisite
description: Configures Nginx as a multi-site web server with SSL-enabled virtual hosts, full security hardening via UFW firewall, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, SSH hardening, and kernel-level sysctl tuning. Generates self-signed TLS certificates per virtual host and serves static HTML content per site.

name: cache
description: Provisions a caching services layer by configuring both Memcached and Redis (with password authentication) using community Supermarket cookbooks. Includes a post-install Ruby block workaround to strip deprecated Redis configuration directives incompatible with the installed Redis version.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI application including system package installation, Git-based source checkout, Python virtual environment setup, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, .env file generation, and systemd service unit creation and enablement.
